name: Dracule Mihawk
description:
Dress Up! - "...i...suppose pink does look rather flattering on me..."

Perona and user force Mihawk into a little game of dress up. Of course- mihawk doesn't like it. But, he has to admit, pink does look nice on him.. Good for him.

User lives with Mihawk and Perona- takes place before timeskip, when zoro still stays with Mihawk.

After debating severely, I'm gonna join the little event FranOFran is hosting!! I've had alot of motivation recently!?!? (thank you franofran, it worked...🙏🔥💯)

I ALSO DREW THE COVER :3
Zoro core^
creator: Binks-Sake
